answers.name: T65
answers.context: Section E. PRODUCT INFORMATION. Instructions for how to use the requested product.
answers.answer: Initial Dose: Every 2 weeks, IVPB. Maintenance Dose: Every 24 weeks, IVPB. Initial infusion rate 50mg/hr, increase by 50mg/hr every 30 minutes to Max Rate 400mg/hr. Subsequent infusions: initiate at 100mg/hr, increase by 100mg/hr every 30 min to Max Rate 400mg/hr.
